parameters.query:
SELECT
    -- Informations de l'en-tete (Commande)
    po.POHNUM_0 AS numero_bc,
    po.APPFLG_0 AS code_signature,
    sign.LANMES_0 AS statut_signature,
    po.INVFLG_0 AS code_facturation,
    fact.LANMES_0 AS statut_facturation,
    po.RCPFLG_0 AS code_reception,
    rcp.LANMES_0 AS statut_reception,
    --po.CLEFLG_0 AS cloture,
	CASE po.CLEFLG_0 
		WHEN 1 THEN 'NON'
		WHEN 2 THEN 'OUI'
		ELSE 'AUTRE'
	END AS cloture,
    po.TTVORD_0 AS total_ttc_commande,
    po.TOTORD_0 AS total_ht_commande,
    po.TOTLINAMT_0 AS total_ht_lignes,
    po.TOTLINATI_0 AS total_ttc_lignes,

    -- Informations des lignes (Details)
    pq.BPSNUM_0 AS code_fournisseur_ligne,
	BPA.BPRNAM_0 as nom_fournisseur,
    pq.ITMREF_0 AS reference_article,
	ITM.ITMDES1_0 as designation_article,
    pq.LINAMT_0 AS montant_ligne,
    pq.QTYPUU_0 AS quantite_commandee,
    pq.RCPQTYPUU_0 AS quantite_receptionnee,
    pq.INVQTYPUU_0 AS quantite_facturee,
    -- pq.LINCLEFLG_0 AS ligne_cloturee,
	CASE pq.LINCLEFLG_0 
		WHEN 1 THEN 'NON'
		WHEN 2 THEN 'OUI'
		ELSE 'AUTRE'
	END AS ligne_cloturee,
    -- pq.LININVFLG_0 AS ligne_facturee,
	CASE pq.LININVFLG_0 
		WHEN 1 THEN 'NON'
		WHEN 2 THEN 'OUI'
		ELSE 'AUTRE'
	END AS ligne_facturee,
    --pq.RCPCLEFLG_0 AS reception_cloturee,
	CASE pq.RCPCLEFLG_0 
		WHEN 1 THEN 'NON'
		WHEN 2 THEN 'OUI'
		ELSE 'AUTRE'
	END AS reception_cloturee



FROM BASE1.PORDER po
INNER JOIN BASE1.PORDERQ pq
    ON po.POHNUM_0 = pq.POHNUM_0
INNER JOIN BASE1.ITMMASTER ITM
	ON pq.ITMREF_0=ITM.ITMREF_0
INNER JOIN BASE1.BPARTNER BPA 
	ON pq.BPSNUM_0=BPA.BPRNUM_0
LEFT JOIN BASE1.APLSTD sign
    ON sign.LANCHP_0 = 280
    AND sign.LAN_0 = 'FRA'
    AND sign.LANNUM_0 = po.APPFLG_0
LEFT JOIN BASE1.APLSTD fact
    ON fact.LANCHP_0 = 280
    AND fact.LAN_0 = 'FRA'
    AND fact.LANNUM_0 = po.INVFLG_0
LEFT JOIN BASE1.APLSTD rcp
    ON rcp.LANCHP_0 = 280
    AND rcp.LAN_0 = 'FRA'
    AND rcp.LANNUM_0 = po.RCPFLG_0
WHERE po.POHNUM_0 = '{{ $json.query.bc }}'

SELECT IDENT1_0, NAM_0
FROM BASE1.AOBJTXT AOB 
WHERE AOB.IDENT1_0 = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.query.bc }}'

SELECT
    (
    F.Soldedépart +
    F.enReception +
    F.enFacturation +
    F.facture +
    F.retourNF +
    F.Réglement +
    F.ECART_AUT
    ) AS Solde
FROM BASE1.SITUATION_FOU F
WHERE F.BPRNUM_0 = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.query.tier }}'
